title: How to ACTUALLY become an academic weapon in 2026
description:
📱 New Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/justmealinaa
👩🏼‍🎓 Personal statement templates & feedback: https://pathtopostgrad.com/pages/services2

It is never too late to become a top student! 
In this video, I share how I went from struggling in my first year at university to becoming an Oxford PhD student. I am living proof that anyone can improve their grades, study smarter, and succeed academically with the right mindset and strategies.
This is a practical guide to becoming an academic weapon
